description: Backend JSON output for one genome antibiotic-response report.

drug_fields.confidence_score: calibrated probability of the reported class
drug_fields.failure_reasons: list of strings — why no_call or why model unavailable
drug_fields.supporting_features: top RF features present in this genome
drug_fields.model_available: false when antibiotic was not trained

evaluation_report_fields.passes_eval: true when test split has R+S and recall criteria met
evaluation_report_fields.skip_reason: why training was skipped for a drug
